title: Mistyllus spumosus

taxonomy: Mistyllus spumosus is classified as a type of flowering plant, specifically a member of the family Celastraceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the Celastraceae family, Mistyllus spumosus is more specifically classified as a genus within the subfamily Salicoidae. Further classification of the plant involves its order (Celastrales) and class (Magnoliopsida). The exact classification may vary depending on the source and current botanical research.
